description_long: This is a classic red fire hydrant, featuring a domed top with a central operating nut and a robust cylindrical body. The hydrant has three prominent hose connection outlets, each capped and secured with bolts, and two of the caps are attached to the body with metal chains. The surface is painted in a weathered red, showing signs of wear and some darkened areas, likely from exposure to the elements. The base and midsection are reinforced with flanges and bolts, giving the hydrant a sturdy, industrial appearance. The overall design is utilitarian, with all functional parts clearly visible and accessible for emergency use. No manufacturer or model markings are visible on the exterior.
description: A weathered red fire hydrant with three capped outlets, metal chains, and a domed top, showing signs of outdoor use. The body is reinforced with flanges and bolts, giving it a sturdy, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central outlet with a cap and chain, flanked by two side outlets, and the domed top with the operating nut clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the right-side outlet and chain, with the central outlet partially visible and the cylindrical body in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two side outlets and the back of the hydrant, with the chains and caps visible but the central outlet less prominent.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite direction, showing the left-side outlet and chain, with the central outlet partially visible.
